notes: Cross-family replacement was filled before profiler rows because Qwen3-Next BF16 is not feasible on this single 96GB node. Use the replacement model ID consistently in server command, client logs, native_control_matrix.json, profiler_metrics.json, and reduction_input_manifest.json.
